data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. All quality gates pass (lint clean, tsc clean, 2392/2392 tests pass). The implementation correctly canonicalizes Claude model identifiers (dots to hyphens) at scan, detect, load, save, and doctor/backfill paths. New agent-config-normalization.ts (147 lines) is well-structured. Tests comprehensively cover all importers (codex, copilot, claude, gemini, opencode) and settings normalization flows. No security issues, no regressions, no invariant violations.
